variant: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

request.message: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

response_body.response:
good—clean slate. since you're 17, intermediate gym experience, dry skin, and own a barbell, here's your 12-week master plan:

## the framework

**skin (skinmax)**: barrier repair → active treatment → maintenance. you're dry, so the first 4 weeks lock in hydration and reduce inflammation, weeks 5–8 introduce gentle actives (azelaic acid), weeks 9–12 add light retinoid and sustain.

**hair (hairmax)**: scalp health → thickness. weeks 1–4 establish a clean routine and reduce dht pressure, weeks 5–8 boost nutrient delivery, weeks 9–12 consolidate gains.

**gym (fitmax)**: strength foundation → hypertrophy → peak. you've got a barbell, so compound focus. weeks 1–4 dial in form and build a baseline, weeks 5–8 push volume and intensity, weeks 9–12 peaking and deload.

all three sync to your 07:00 wake, 23:00 sleep. morning routine (skin + hair + mewing) takes ~20 min, gym is mid-afternoon, evening skin care is 10 min.

---

## 12-week breakdown

products.name: CeraVe Hydrating Facial Cleanser
products.description: Ceramide-based, fragrance-free, non-stripping — pairs with any active.

products.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream (Tub)
products.description: Heavy occlusive cream — good for very dry / eczema-prone skin.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

products.name: Alpecin C1 Caffeine Shampoo
products.description: Caffeine shampoo — DHT-blocker pairing with minoxidil.
